sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54128" key="katakeraste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατα-κεραστέον</orth>, <sense id="n54128.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must mix, temper</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg004:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
